response.justification: Szabo brings roughly 20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems, satisfying the experience floor, and his current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work. However, the role is a Director-level IC position centered on recognized AI expertise, enterprise customer advisory, and cloud/AI product strategy — areas where the resume shows almost no evidence. His AI involvement began in April 2025, is focused on tooling rather than strategy, and there is no indication of cross-organizational influence, published AI work, or the kind of demonstrated AI platform leadership the role explicitly requires.
strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering across multiple domains satisfies the minimum experience requirement
Founding and sustaining GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial product ownership end-to-end
Current role at re:cinq includes direct work on AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: AI experience is limited to roughly one year of tooling work with no prior demonstrated AI platform leadership or recognized expertise
No evidence of Director-level strategic scope: no customer advisory history, no cross-organization influence, no published AI research or recognized industry presence
No cloud platform expertise and no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, missing both preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Long engineering career and entrepreneurial background
